programs.title: MLB Baseball

programs.title: NHL Hockey
programs.description: Canadiens visit the Sabres for a pivotal Game 5 round of the Eastern Conference at KeyBank Center. The Sabres forward Zach Benson broke a 2-2 tie in Game 4 on a third-period power play on his 21st birthday in this matchup. The series is tied at 2-2.

programs.title: NHL Hockey
programs.description: The Golden Knights visit the Ducks for a crucial Game 6 of the Western Conference round. Pavel Dorofeyev scored 2 goals along with the game-winning goal in match round 5. Following an overtime loss in last match, the Knights lead this series 3-2.
